title: Pack of 8 Cabinet Hinges Kitchen Cupboard Hinge, Bedroom Wardrobe Door Hinges for Bathroom Bedroom Dining Room Full Overlay Mute Hydraulic Soft Close (48Pcs Screws)
features: Applicable to a variety of scenarios: The Cupboard Hinges are suitable for a variety of decoration styles such as kitchen cabinet doors bathroom cabinet doors mirror cabinets etc bedroom wardrobes living room shoe cabinets sideboards etc

5 star quality: The material of cupboard door hinges are made of high-quality nickel-plated steel thickness: 1.0mm double-layer electroplating process strong corrosion resistance moisture resistance and no rust Copper-plated inner layer and nickel-plated outer layer Reinforced rivets made of high-strength carbon steel will not fall off for a long time
Soft Close: Full Overlay cabinet hinges for cupboard doors nice soft close action realize smooth and quiet movement when the door is closed slowly fast release

Specifications: The slot diameter of 35 mm range Safety hinge opening angle 105° full overlay and it is fixed hinge suitable for the door fully covers the side panel If you remove the cabinet door you have to loosen the screws of the Hinges for cupboard doors

Features: The buffer of the Wardrobe hinges are closed for 3-6 seconds Extended copper hydraulic pump sealed hydraulic transmission quiet opening and closing without damage and without oil leakage Easy adjustment for alignment of the doors
description: Product Description The kitchen cupboard door hinges are suitable for a variety of decoration styles and furniture, such as kitchen cabinet doors, bathroom cabinet doors, mirror cabinets, bedroom wardrobes, living room shoe cabinets, sideboards, and more.
